channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: “A significant portion of the market is not equipped to handle that responsibility”: the VPN industry reacts to TechRadar's research
item.description: In the wake of our exclusive research, what should users do to stay secure?

item.title: COPPA 2.0 passes the Senate again, unanimously this time
item.description: Today the US Senate unanimously passed proposed legislation known as COPPA 2.0. This measure, fully named the Children and Teens’ Online Privacy Protection Act, aims to create new protections for younger users online, such as blocking platforms from collecting their personal data without consent. COPPA 2.0 is a modernized take on the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998, attempting to address recent changes in common online activities, like targeted advertising, that could prove harmful to minors. Lawmakers have made several attempts to get this bipartisan bill through. While it ha...

item.title: Quel iPhone reconditionné choisir en 2026 ? Les meilleurs modèles d’Apple
item.description: Envie d’un iPhone pas trop cher, et les tarifs d’un modèle neuf sont trop élevés pour vous ? Nous avons sélectionné les meilleurs iPhone reconditionnés disponibles sur le marché à l'heure actuelle.

item.title: Watch Ryan Gosling Meet His Adorable Alien Co-Star in This ‘Project Hail Mary’ Clip
item.description: Who among us wouldn't watch an alien play with toys?

item.title: J’adore le Galaxy S26 Ultra, mais je ne sais pas si Samsung a vraiment tout donné : mon test complet
item.description: Le Galaxy S26 Ultra surprend tout le monde avec son impressionnant affichage confidentiel unique sur le marché. Mais au-delà de ça, que vaut le nouveau roi de Samsung ? Voici notre test complet.

item.title: I've found three great DDR5 RAM deals from big-name brands with sizable savings — plus promo codes to cut the price even further
item.description: Save up to $70 on 32GB of DDR5-6000 right now — three discounts that buck the trend in today’s unpredictable DDR5 market.

item.title: Wolves vs Liverpool Free Streams: How to Watch FA Cup 5th Round Tie 2025/26 Online From Anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Wolves vs Liverpool in the FA Cup fifth round, with the home side seeking to make it two wins in just four days against the Reds.

item.title: Galaxy S26 : carton plein pour les précommandes, l’Ultra est un énorme succès
item.description: L'actualité filant à toute vitesse, on n'en voudra à personne d'avoir oublié que les Galaxy S26 ne sont toujours pas disponibles dans le commerce — les nouveaux smartphones de Samsung présentés fin février sortiront le 11 mars. En attendant, les précommandes battent leur plein et la bonne surprise pour le constructeur, c'est que la demande est au rendez-vous....

item.title: Ireland vs Wales Free Streams: How to watch Six Nations 2026 game, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Ireland vs Wales live streams online – including for FREE – as the visitors seek to disrupt hosts' hunt for the 2026 Six Nations title.

item.title: Google has quietly made Gmail, Docs, and other Workspace apps work better with OpenClaw
item.description: Google shares 40+ agent skills in "one CLI for all of Google Workspace," but it's "not an officially supported Google product."

item.title: Enceintes détachables, Dolby Atmos, DTS:X : cette barre de son JBL 11.1.4 qui offre un vrai son surround coûte moins de 980 €
item.description: Avec son caisson de basses puissant et ses enceintes détachables, la JBL Bar 1300MK2 est une barre de son ultra haut de gamme qui promet une spatialisation digne de celle offerte par de vrais systèmes home‑cinéma. Si elle vous intéresse, sachez que Rakuten la propose à 979 euros au lieu de 1 499 euros.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra : attention, le câble de la boîte bride votre recharge
item.description: Vous venez de déballer votre rutilant Galaxy S26 Ultra et vous trouvez que la charge traîne la patte ? Ne cherchez plus le coupable : il est juste sous vos yeux, enroulé dans le packaging.

item.title: Capcom's long-delayed Pragmata is now arriving a week earlier
item.description: Capcom revealed during its March 5 Spotlight showcase that Pragmata, its repeatedly delayed dystopian sci-fi adventure game, will release on April 17 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Nintendo Switch 2 and PC via Steam. The game had been set for April 24 since its appearance at The Game Awards in December. The game’s new trailer shows previously unseen locations and gameplay moments, and new elements within the Shelter, the in-game lunar base. Pragmata was first revealed in 2020 with a 2022 release window. Capcom then delayed it to 2023, then went radio silent on the project before resurfaci...

item.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
item.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

item.title: Rachat de Warner Bros. : négociations, Netflix vs Paramount et HBO Max, tout comprendre à la situation
item.description: C'est l'un des temps forts de ce début d'année. Le rachat de Warner Bros. Discovery s'est transformé en véritable feuilleton avec les enchères entre Paramount et Netflix. Faisons le point sur la situation.

item.title: We need to rethink our love affair with big vehicles
item.description: Putting already careless and reckless drivers in large vehicles without any sort of demonstrated skill is asking for trouble. There aren’t enough hours in the day to be an expert on every issue (even though we’re expected to hold a strong opinion on just about everything). I prefer to stick to topics I’m already familiar with or in the process of learning. But sometimes, especially on X/Twitter, I’ll post color commentary about an issue that’s not in my wheelhouse. It’s a good way for me to keep the bigger picture of human flourishing in sight. Those topics might be childhood independence, eco...

item.title: Scientists Find a Built-In Weapon Against Peanut Allergies: Human Spit
item.description: The discovery could introduce new ways of preventing some of the most severe allergic reactions.

item.title: A brief history of surprisingly cheap Apple products
item.description: The MacBook Neo’s $599 price is notable, but hardly unprecedented. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In.

item.title: Tired of noisy airplane passengers? Good news — United Airlines says it will now ban those who ‘fail to use headphones’ for music and video
item.description: The airline company now has the right to remove passengers from flights and issue permanent bans if you play audio without headphones.

item.title: This Core Ultra U5-125H Windows 11 Pro laptop with 32GB of DDR5 RAM and a 1TB SSD is a powerhouse for creatives and professionals — and it's under $1000 right now
item.description: Geekom GeekBook X14 Pro gives creatives and multitaskers the speed, storage, and portability they need, for 33% less.

item.title: Saber Interactive confirms its Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic remake 'is still in development'
item.description: It's been a while since we've heard any updates about Saber Interactive's Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic remake, but the developer has now confirmed that the game is still in the works.

item.title: Tesla vient d’installer la plus grande batterie de France : à quoi va-t-elle servir ?
item.description: Un immense site de stockage énergétique voit le jour du côté de la Marne. La plus grande centrale par batteries de la France vient d’y être installée par Tesla.

item.title: Wendy’s just took the fast-food burger trolling wars to the next level. You could get a big paycheck out of it
item.description: The restaurant chain says it’s hiring a ‘chief tasting officer,’ but be prepared to create some engaging content if you want to apply. Dream job alert: Wendy’s is looking to hire a “chief tasting officer”—and the role pays $100,000.

item.title: The Next-Gen Xbox Will Make Us Rethink Everything About Consoles
item.description: Xbox's 'Project Helix' isn't a 360 revolution, but a twisted ascent.

item.title: The best RTX 5060 laptop deal right now is this 16-inch Core i7-14700HX beast, with 32GB of DDR5 RAM — and a massive $800 discount
item.description: Core i7-14700HX powered Hasee T8 Pro 16-inch laptop is just $1200 — a massive $800 off its usual price.

item.title: Why Luckin Coffee, Starbucks’ biggest competitor, wants to buy Blue Bottle
item.description: The coffee wars are about to, forgive us, heat up. The Chinese coffee giant Luckin is reportedly acquiring the third wave coffee mecca Blue Bottle in a deal worth just shy of $400 million. It’s more than another acquisition: Luckin is making its most aggressive move on Starbucks since it opened its first U.S. locations in New York in 2025 in a rivalry that is quickly heating up....

item.title: This Windows 11 mini PC deal is a serious office upgrade: Acemagic Kron Mini K1 has a Ryzen 5 7430U CPU and 16GB RAM — and you can save £130 with this special code
item.description: The Acemagic Kron Mini KI has a Ryzen 5 7430U CPU, 16GB RAM, a 512GB SSD - and costs just £330 with this special code.

item.title: Ce nouveau robot de piscine Beatbot s’occupe (enfin) de la surface : voici le Sora 70
item.description: Beatbot n'est pas forcément la marque la plus connue du grand public, mais elle s'est fait une place sur le marché très spécifique des robots de piscine haut de gamme. Le constructeur lance le Sora 70, un nouveau modèle qui se gare tout seul à la surface et aspire les feuilles.

item.title: From boardroom risk to deal flow: why cyber M&A is accelerating in 2026
item.description: Cyber is now a business continuity imperative, pushing buyers towards faster capability building via M&A.

item.title: ‘War Between the Land and the Sea’ Cut a Giant Squid Storm From Its Sea Devil Invasion
item.description: It's a shame they cut this and not some of the other bizarre things the 'Doctor Who' spinoff does with its underwater attackers.

item.title: Nvidia préparerait une nouvelle carte graphique RTX 5050 à la configuration étonnante
item.description: Selon plusieurs sources, la RTX 5050 pourrait se décliner en un nouveau modèle. Un choix qui laisse perplexe sur le papier.

item.title: The time change in the U.S. this weekend is a problem, and there’s no consensus on how to fix it
item.description: Millions of people will follow the seasonal routine of moving their clocks forward this Sunday at 2 a.m. Clocks will skip ahead an hour at 2 a.m. Sunday for daylight saving time in most of the U.S., creating a 23-hour day that throws off sleep schedules, plunges early-morning dog walks into darkness and inspires millions of complaints.Even though polls show most people dislike the system that has most Americans changing clocks twice a year, the political moves necessary to change the system haven’t succeeded because opinions on the issue and its potential impacts are sharply divided.Want to ma...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs smartphones en mars 2026 ?
item.description: Vous hésitez sur votre prochain smartphone à acheter ? Bienvenue sur notre guide réunissant les modèles les plus performants du moment, tous soigneusement testés par notre équipe. Cette sélection met en avant les meilleurs téléphones selon leurs points forts pour des prix différents.

item.title: How to watch Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Mönchengladbach online for free
item.description: How to watch Bundesliga for free. Watch Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Mönchengladbach in the Bundesliga for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Dallas Stars vs. Colorado Avalanche online for free
item.description: How to watch NHL for free. Live stream Dallas Stars vs. Colorado Avalanche in the NHL for free.

item.title: Alysa Liu’s hometown skating rink tells a surprising story about cities
item.description: Liu grew up training at the Oakland Ice Center, a product of the now-defunct community development programs that once helped create economic opportunity across California. It could have easily become a high-rise luxury condo complex. Or maybe a struggling office tower now being converted into luxury condos. Maybe a parking garage, or a data center.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 T20 World Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch T20 World Cup for free. Live stream the 2026 T20 World Cup final for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Le « HomePad » d’Apple pourrait finalement arriver cet automne
item.description: On ne compte plus le nombre de fois où la rumeur nous a promis le lancement imminent du « HomePad », ce hub Apple pour contrôler la maison. Mais cette fois, c'est la bonne… peut-être. L'indiscrétion du jour est en tout cas l'occasion de faire le point sur cet appareil désormais mythique.

item.title: FBI says its investigating claims its systems were compromised - wire taps and search warrants apparently hijacked
item.description: FBI is unsurprisingly staying quiet on specific details, but it could be the work of a Chinese hacking group.

item.title: iPhone 17e vs Google Pixel 10a : faut-il payer plus cher pour Apple ou craquer pour le Pixel ?
item.description: Pixel 10a ou iPhone 17e ? Nous avons comparé les deux smartphones « abordables » 2026 de Google et Apple. Si Google domine sur le prix et l'écran, Apple réplique avec sa puce A19.

item.title: Think AI hallucinations are bad? Here's why you're wrong
item.description: AI isn’t deterministic, its probabilistic, so reset your expectations and build guardrails for business value.

item.title: The Trump phone was a no-show at the world’s biggest mobile show
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This time, we tried, and failed, to find it at the world's biggest mobile trade show. This week Barcelona was taken over by the tech industry as Mobile World Congress […]

item.title: Trump’s surgeon general nominee is running the wellness grifter playbook perfectly
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. We'll be taking a break next week and will back March 20th. Opt in for Optimizer here. On the surface, the wellness to […]

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, March 7 (game #734)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.description: How to watch World Baseball Classic for free. Live stream South Korea vs. Japan in the 2026 World Baseball Classic for free.

item.title: The Bose Ultra Open-Ear earbuds are $100 off as Best Buys Deal of the Day
item.description: As of March 6, the Bose Ultra Open-Ear earbuds are on sale at Best Buy for $199 as part of its Deal of the Day. This is $100 off their list price of $299.

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 : les excellents écouteurs d’Apple sont déjà à prix cassé grâce à ce super deal du jour
item.description: Les AirPods Pro 3 cumulent les qualités : performance acoustique, réduction de bruit active, autonomie, intégration dans l'écosystème Apple... Ils cochent toutes les cases et on les trouve en ce moment à 204 euros au lieu de 249 euros sur Amazon.
